sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 존슨앤드존슨은 2026년 1분기 매출 241억 달러를 기록하며 연간 가이던스를 상향 조정했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 매출은 전년 동기 대비 9.9% 증가한 240억 6,200만 달러를 기록했습니다.
연간 매출 가이던스를 1,008억 달러로, 조정 주당순이익(EPS) 가이던스를 11.55달러로 상향 조정했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 판상 건선 치료제 ICOTYDE, 다발성 골수종 치료제 TECVAYLI, 안과용 렌즈 TECNIS PureSee 등 주요 제품의 승인을 통해 포트폴리오를 강화했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 지역별 매출은 미국 내 133억 3,000만 달러, 해외 107억 3,200만 달러를 기록했습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a2026q1exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Media contact: media-relations@its.jnj.com Investor contact: investor-relations@its.jnj.com For immediate release Johnson & Johnson reports Q1 2026 results, raises 2026 outlook • 2026 First-Quarter reported sales growth of 9.9% to $24.1 Billion with operational growth of 6.4%* and adjusted operational growth of 5.3%* • 2026 First-Quarter earnings per share (EPS) of $2.14 and adjusted EPS of $2.70 • Company increases 2026 guidance with estimated reported sales of $100.8 Billion or 7.0% at the midpoint, and adjusted EPS 4 of $11.55 or 7.1% at the midpoint • Solidifying path to double-digit growth by the end of the decade, with significant progress for patients with the approvals of ICOTYDE the first-and-only targeted oral peptide for plaque psoriasis, TECVAYLI plu  Normalized numeric aliases: $24.1 Billion = 241억 달러; $100.8 Billion = 1,008억 달러; $24.1 = 24.1달러; $2.14 = 2.14달러; $2.70 = 2.70달러; $100.8 = 100.8달러; $11.55 = 11.55달러.

ed/refractory multiple myeloma, VARIPULSE Pro in Europe with a new pulse sequence that is now 5 times faster, and TECNIS PureSee Intraocular Lens for U.S. Cataract Patients • Company announces planned Enterprise Business Review for December 8, 2026 New Brunswick, N.J. (April 14, 2026) – Johnson & Johnson (NYSE: JNJ) today announced results for first-quarter 2026. “Johnson & Johnson had a strong start to 2026 and is delivering on its promise for a year of accelerated growth and impact,” said Joaquin Duato, Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Johnson & Johnson. “The depth and strength of our portfolio and pipeline is unrivaled and our relentless focus on innovation delivered multiple game-changing approvals this quarter, including ICOTYDE in the U.S. for moderate to severe plaque psoriasis and VARIPULSE Pro in Europe. These advancements have the potential to transform patient outcomes an

d create sustainable, long-term value for shareholders.” Overall financial results Q1 ($ in Millions, except EPS) 2026 2025 % Change Reported Sales $24,062 $21,893 9.9% Net Earnings $5,235 $10,999 -52.4% EPS (diluted) $2.14 $4.54 -52.9% Q1 Non-GAAP* ($ in Millions, except EPS) 2026 2025 % Change Operational Sales notes 1 and 2 6.4% Adjusted Operational Sales notes 1 and 3 5.3% Adjusted Net Earnings notes 1 and 4 $6,614 $6,706 -1.4% Adjusted EPS (diluted) notes 1 and 4 $2.70 $2.77 -2.5% Free Cash Flow notes 5 and 6 ~$1,500 $3,379 1 Non-GAAP financial measure; refer to reconciliations of non-GAAP financial measures in  Normalized numeric aliases: $5,235 = 5,235달러; $2.14 = 2.14달러; $4.54 = 4.54달러; $6,614 = 6,614달러; $6,706 = 6,706달러; $2.70 = 2.70달러; $2.77 = 2.77달러; $1,500 = 1,500달러; 24,062 million = 240억 6,200만 달러; 6,706 million = 67억 600만 달러; 5,235 million = 52억 3,500만 달러; 10,999 million = 109억 9,900만 달러; 6,614 million = 66억 1,400만 달러; 1,500 million = 15억 달러; 3,379 million = 33억 7,900만 달러.

rating activities, less additions to property, plant and equipment. Cash flow from operations, the most directly comparable GAAP financial measure, will be included in subsequent SEC filings. 6 First-quarter 2026 is estimated as of April 14, 2026 Note: values may have been rounded Regional sales results Q1 % Change ($ in Millions) 2026 2025 Reported Operational notes 1 and 2 Currency Adjusted Operational notes 1 and 3 U.S. $13,330 $12,305 8.3% 8.3 - 6.2 International 10,732 9,588 11.9 3.9 8.0 4.0 Worldwide $24,062 $21,893 9.9% 6.4 3.5 5.3 1 Non-GAAP financial measure; refer to reconciliations of non-GAAP financial measures included in accompanying schedules 2 Excludes the impact of translational currency 3 Excludes the net impact of acquisitions and divestitures and   Normalized numeric aliases: 13,330 million = 133억 3,000만 달러; 12,305 million = 123억 500만 달러; 10,732 million = 107억 3,200만 달러; 9,588 million = 95억 8,800만 달러; 24,062 million = 240억 6,200만 달러; 21,893 million = 218억 9,300만 달러.
